programmes.show_description: The Glovers race to get their wood and machines off Erie Mountain before government road restrictions shut them down for spring. Craig's crew rush to get stranded wood off the landing.
Matt Adams rides a volatile load into a world of trouble with a bull on board. The Kendalls share a family trucking experience and another haul carries a sting...
The heat is on for Dean and Daniel after a garage fire leaves 11 vehicles in need of removal. Most of the vehicles are complete write-offs so the duo must get these burnouts out.
Near the Scottish border, a massive articulated truck has tumbled down a steep slope and toppled on to its side and in the Midlands a lorry has caught fire on the busy A1.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
This episode hits the ground running as the interceptors pull over a driver, who casually steps out of the car, before taking off like a shot.
Police enter a 'house of horrors' seeking a man on the run. Plus, an epic 45-mile pursuit.
Cops seek a car on clone plates that has racked up nearly 600 fines. PC Leslie pulls over a driver in a car that's not his, with no insurance and no licence.
PC Tommy Wade is forced to ram a car to a stop - but why is the driver so desperate to get away from the cops? And police race to a serious two-car collision.
A cop pursues a vehicle after a report of a cloned car with a balaclava-wearing driver. In Byker, PCs witness what looks like a drug deal through a car window.
Police tackle a drink driver at 8am, an uninsured pizza delivery man, and a reckless driver wanting a selfie despite having no licence or insurance.
Northumbria Police face a daily battle with dangerous and illegal motorbike use. In Newcastle, cops pursue - by car and chopper - a group riding off-road.
The evil Clanton gang kills Marshal Wyatt Earp's brother after he saves Doc Holliday, a gambler, from them. He and Doc then go on a mission to take revenge.

Western starring Burt Lancaster and Diana Lynn. A man seeks a better life with his son in Texas, only to become embroiled in a feud between rival households. (1955)

Military drama in which a former US marine and prisoner of war attempts to find a POW camp and liberate the prisoners to prove that soldiers are still being held captive. (1984)

Mulder suspects supernatural involvement in two identical murders committed at exactly the same time on different coasts.
Mulder and Scully are called in to investigate cases of seemingly spontaneous combustion.
Upset by a death in her family, Scully becomes entangled in the machinations of a serial killer on the loose and a murderer on death row.
Scully and Mulder probe the death of someone who apparently died from an overdose of orgasmic delight.
An injured FBI agent appears to be possessed by a criminal he shot, and Scully herself is in danger.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Simon grapples with a juggernaut that has skidded off the M62 and is leaking diesel. Rory deals with a mobile library that's been the victim of an arson attack.
A luxury coach gives up the ghost on a motorway slip road. A straightforward job segues into disaster for Marta. Scott races to recover a damaged trailer before dark descends.
Jim must rescue a 32-tonne truck from a soft dirt embankment. Marta is driven around the bend trying to deliver a 48-foot articulated bus.
Matt Adams is rustling up his roughest ride ever. Plus, Macca McReady sails into trouble and the Stephens brothers battle backwoods to rescue their haul.
Tanker driver Sludge tries to dodge disaster, Steve Graham suffers from his worst nightmare on the road, and Macca McReady hits rough weather that throws him into jeopardy.
Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery, Yogi runs out of road, and two concrete specialists head off the map and into trouble.
Jonny Rayner faces a seemingly impossible choice - take on a crocodile-infested river at 2am or wait until dawn and further delay his critical run.
Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt, Roscoe battles the elements on a world-famous rally, and Turbo is flagged down by the boys in blue.
Frontier drama starring Victor Mature and Suzan Ball. The story of a legendary Native American warrior who rises through the ranks to become chief of his tribe. (1955)
